artifact.description: Curated adverse event dataset from Phase III clinical trial NCT-2026-04821, combining patient-reported outcomes with AI-extracted signals from unstructured clinical notes

ai_assistance.description: Extracted structured adverse event mentions from 12,400 free-text clinical notes using fine-tuned NER model
Reviewed extraction quality by sampling 200 notes and flagging misclassified severity grades

review.notes: Validated extraction accuracy against manual annotations on 500-note gold standard subset. Precision 94.2%, recall 91.7%.

decisions.description: Overrode AI severity classification for 47 adverse events where model assigned 'mild' but clinical context indicated 'moderate' based on duration and functional impact
decisions.context: NER model was trained on outpatient data; trial population includes post-surgical patients with different baseline severity thresholds

aiInputs.contribution: Classified adverse event severity using MedDRA preferred terms and duration heuristics

decisions.rationale: Model's severity heuristics don't account for post-surgical baseline. Manual review of flagged cases confirmed 43 of 47 warranted upgrade to moderate based on CTCAE v5.0 grading criteria.
